sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_xml (id Int32, value String);
INSERT INTO test_xml (id, value) VALUES (1, encodeXMLComponent('Hello, "world"!'));
UPDATE test_xml SET value = encodeXMLComponent('<123>') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, encodeXMLComponent(value) AS escaped_value FROM test_xml;
INSERT INTO test_xml (id, value) VALUES (2, encodeXMLComponent('&clickhouse'));
